info.title: ppg
info.description: A CLI tool that generates Playwright Page Object Model (POM) tests for Angular applications. Automatically analyzes Angular components and creates type-safe page objects, selectors, test fixtures, and test specs.

commands.name: app
commands.description: Generate Playwright Page Object Model tests for a single Angular application

options.name: --output
options.description: Output directory for generated files

options.name: --header
options.description: Header template for generated files. Supports placeholders: {FileName}, {GeneratedDate}, {ToolVersion}. By default, no header is included.

options.name: --test-suffix
options.description: Suffix for test files (default: 'spec'). For example, 'test' produces 'component.test.ts'.

options.name: --debug
options.description: Enable debug mode. When enabled, the HTML template is included as a comment in generated page object files.

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

commands.name: artifacts
commands.description: Generate specific Playwright artifacts (fixtures, configs, selectors, page objects, helpers)

options.name: --output
options.description: Output directory for generated files

options.name: --project
options.description: Specific project name (for workspaces)

options.name: --fixtures
options.description: Generate test fixtures

options.name: --configs
options.description: Generate Playwright configuration

options.name: --selectors
options.description: Generate selector files

options.name: --page-objects
options.description: Generate page object files

options.name: --helpers
options.description: Generate helper utilities

options.name: --all
options.description: Generate all artifacts

options.name: --header
options.description: Header template for generated files. Supports placeholders: {FileName}, {GeneratedDate}, {ToolVersion}. By default, no header is included.

options.name: --test-suffix
options.description: Suffix for test files (default: 'spec'). For example, 'test' produces 'component.test.ts'.

options.name: --debug
options.description: Enable debug mode. When enabled, the HTML template is included as a comment in generated page object files.

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

arguments.name: path
arguments.description: Path to the Angular workspace or application

commands.name: lib
commands.description: Generate Playwright Page Object Model tests for a single Angular library

options.name: --output
options.description: Output directory for generated files

options.name: --header
options.description: Header template for generated files. Supports placeholders: {FileName}, {GeneratedDate}, {ToolVersion}. By default, no header is included.

options.name: --test-suffix

options.name: --debug

options.name: --help

commands.name: remote
commands.description: Generate Playwright Page Object Model tests from a remote git repository URL (GitHub, GitLab, Bitbucket, Azure DevOps, or any git host)

options.name: --output
options.description: Output directory for generated files. Defaults to the current working directory.

options.name: --header
options.description: Header template for generated files. Supports placeholders: {FileName}, {GeneratedDate}, {ToolVersion}. By default, no header is included.

options.name: --test-suffix
options.description: Suffix for test files (default: 'spec'). For example, 'test' produces 'component.test.ts'.

options.name: --debug
options.description: Enable debug mode. When enabled, the HTML template is included as a comment in generated page object files.

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

arguments.name: url
arguments.description: Git URL to a component file, folder, or repository (e.g., https://github.com/owner/repo/blob/main/src/app/my-component/my-component.ts)

commands.name: signalr-mock
commands.description: Generate a fully functional SignalR mock fixture using RxJS

options.name: --header
options.description: Header template for generated files. Supports placeholders: {FileName}, {GeneratedDate}, {ToolVersion}. By default, no header is included.

options.name: --test-suffix
options.description: Suffix for test files (default: 'spec'). For example, 'test' produces 'component.test.ts'.

options.name: --debug
options.description: Enable debug mode. When enabled, the HTML template is included as a comment in generated page object files.

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

arguments.name: output
arguments.description: Output directory for the generated SignalR mock file [default: .]

options.description: Enable debug mode. When enabled, the HTML template is included as a comment in generated page object files.
